note: Deduped by article URL — one card per story, with all associated MPPs merged. Auto-refreshed from Google News RSS (accountability-signal filter). Hand-written summaries marked curated are preserved on merge.

items.title: Emergency minister’s CBC interview cut short; First Nations call for wildfire inquiry
items.summary: Staff ended Jill Dunlop’s As It Happens interview after questions about First Nations criticism of Ontario’s wildfire evacuations. Chiefs have called for a public inquiry into delays and gaps in the provincial response.

Tourism minister resigns amid GTA hotel expense scrutiny; Ford says MPPs will repay
items.summary: Stan Cho stepped down as Minister of Tourism, Culture and Gaming after reporting on GTA Progressive Conservative MPPs billing taxpayers for Toronto hotel stays. Coverage also named Nina Tangri, Hardeep Grewal, and Charmaine Williams among high claimants; Ford said amounts would be repaid.

items.title: Integrity complaint over ads in father’s newspaper
items.summary: NDP Leader Marit Stiles asked the Integrity Commissioner to examine whether Brampton East MPP Hardeep Grewal used constituency funds for ads in The Punjabi Post, run by his father.

items.title: Brampton MPPs under fire for Toronto hotel expense claims
items.summary: Reporting highlighted Brampton East and Brampton Centre MPPs among GTA Progressive Conservatives who expensed substantial Toronto hotel stays while living in the GTA.
